details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia article, extracted data from the page snapshot, and correctly reported the winners for the 3 most recent years: 2024 (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton), 2023 (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier), and 2022 (Alain Aspect, John Clauser, Anton Zeilinger). The data was extracted from actual page content, not hallucinated.
